result.stdout:
Description:
  A cli tool helps you create new projects with a template.

Usage:
  voyager [command] [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbose                                  Show detailed log
  -p, --templates-endpoint <templates-endpoint>  The endpoint to fetch templates from. [default: https://gitlab.aiursoft.com/aiursoft/voyager/-/raw/master/templates.json]
  -?, -h, --help                                 Show help and usage information
  --version                                      Show version information

Commands:
  new   Create a new project based on a template.
  list  List all available templates.

  --version                                      Show version information

Commands:
  new   Create a new project based on a template.
  list  List all available templates.

result.stdout:
Didn't pass the argument '-n', using the current directory name 'inspectra-help-aiursoft.voyager-10.0.22-e7a6e1a0e89f45e18bc35050189ce8a8' as the project name.
Description:
  Create a new project based on a template.

Usage:
  voyager new [options]

Didn't pass the argument '-n', using the current directory name 'inspectra-help-aiursoft.voyager-10.0.22-e7a6e1a0e89f45e18bc35050189ce8a8' as the project name.
Options:
  --path <path>                                               The path to the project. [default: .]
  -t, --template-short-name <template-short-name> (REQUIRED)  The short name of the template to use. Run `voyager list` to see all available templates.
  -p, --templates-endpoint <templates-endpoint>               The endpoint to fetch templates from. [default: https://gitlab.aiursoft.com/aiursoft/voyager/-/raw/master/templates.json]
  -n, --name <name>                                           The name of the new project. [default: inspectra-help-aiursoft.voyager-10.0.22-e7a6e1a0e89f45e18bc35050189ce8a8]
  -v, --verbose                                               Show detailed log
  -?, -h, --help                                              Show help and usage information
  -v, --verbose                                               Show detailed log
  -p, --templates-endpoint <templates-endpoint>               The endpoint to fetch templates from. [default: https://gitlab.aiursoft.com/aiursoft/voyager/-/raw/master/templates.json]
